ModMetaData.name: LxO - Learn to Survive
ModMetaData.author: Lexxers
ModMetaData.description:
Your colonists are no longer static. They learn from experience.
Five new intelligence stats that grow over time as pawns perform activities. Level 0 is vanilla behavior. Each level unlocks smarter decisions -- from batch hauling to tactical combat coordination.
HAULING SENSE - Efficient item transport, multi-item carrying, route optimization WORK AWARENESS - Task chaining, pre-cleaning, proximity-aware work selection PATH MEMORY - Learned shortcuts, room avoidance, weather routing COMBAT INSTINCT - Cover seeking, friendly fire avoidance, tactical coordination SELF-PRESERVATION - Smart food choices, need anticipation, medicine matching
Skills never decay. Veteran colonists become irreplaceable. Losing one means losing years of learned intelligence.
Level 20 masters can write books to teach others.
Compatible with Pick Up And Haul, Common Sense, Combat Extended, and most other mods.
Free forever. Donations welcome at ko-fi.com/lexxers
